name: Park UI
description: Copy-paste components built on Ark UI primitives with Panda CSS or Tailwind styling for multiple frameworks

description.value: Copy-paste components built on Ark UI primitives with Panda CSS or Tailwind styling for multiple frameworks

active-maintenance.comment: Active: 1,015 commits, 44 releases, 30 contributors, regular updates in 2024

framework.comment: Multi-framework support: React, Vue, and Solid. Works with metaframeworks like Next.js and Nuxt

styling-approach.comment: Supports both Panda CSS (zero-runtime CSS-in-JS) and Tailwind CSS styling approaches

component-model.comment: Styled components built on headless Ark UI primitives; provides ready-to-use designs that users copy and own

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (90.3% of codebase) with full type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support for Next.js, Nuxt, and other frameworks through Panda CSS zero-runtime approach

rsc-compatible.comment: React Server Components compatible through Panda CSS zero-runtime styling; interactive components require 'use client' directive

design-system.comment: No specific design system; uses Radix Colors under the hood with customizable accent colors and gray scales

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode support with semantic tokens for light and dark color variants; can force dark/light mode per component

theming-system.comment: Extensive theming with colorPalette prop, semantic tokens, and customizable accent colors (25+ preset colors)

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties for theming through Panda CSS design tokens

design-tokens.comment: Full design token system via Panda CSS with colors, typography, spacing, and more

rtl-support.comment: RTL support not explicitly documented; likely inherits from Panda CSS and Ark UI support

component-count.comment: 45+ components inherited from Ark UI foundation, including forms, overlays, navigation, and data display

text-input.comment: Input component with Field wrapper for labels and help text

textarea.comment: Textarea component for multi-line text input

select.comment: Select component with custom styled dropdown

multi-select.comment: No dedicated multi-select; can use Tags Input or Combobox for similar functionality

combobox.comment: Combobox component with autocomplete and filtering support

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component with Checkbox Group for multiple selections

radio.comment: Radio Group component for mutually exclusive selections

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for binary toggle; Toggle and Toggle Group also available

slider.comment: Slider component with single and range modes; also Angle Slider for circular input

number-input.comment: Number Input component with increment/decrement controls

tag-input.comment: Tags Input component for entering multiple tags with add/remove functionality

pin-input.comment: Pin Input component for OTP/PIN code entry with individual character boxes

color-picker.comment: Color Picker component with area, channel sliders, and swatch support

date-picker.comment: Date Picker component with calendar-based date selection

time-picker.comment: No dedicated time picker component in Ark UI

date-range-picker.comment: Date Picker supports range selection mode

file-upload.comment: File Upload component available from Ark UI

dropzone.comment: File Upload includes drag-and-drop dropzone functionality

rating-input.comment: Rating Group component for star ratings

input-groups.comment: Input Group component for combining inputs with addons via Field component

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown; can compose using Combobox or custom implementation

button-groups.comment: Segment Group component for grouped buttons; Toggle Group also available

table.comment: Table component with styled rows, headers, and cells

data-table.comment: No advanced data table with built-in sorting/filtering; basic Table only

tree-view.comment: Tree View component for hierarchical data display

card.comment: Card component with header, body, and footer sections

calendar.comment: Calendar component available as part of Date Picker

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for determinate progress (linear and circular)

empty-state.comment: Empty State component for empty content areas

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component for modal overlays with proper focus management

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component for slide-in panels from any edge

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for hover hints; Hover Card also available

dropdown-menu.comment: Menu component for dropdown action menus

context-menu.comment: Menu component supports context menu (right-click) trigger

command-palette.comment: No dedicated command palette component; can build with Combobox

stepper.comment: Steps component for multi-step process navigation

navigation-menu.comment: No dedicated navigation menu with mega-dropdowns

sidebar.comment: No dedicated sidebar component; can compose with Collapsible and other primitives

grid.comment: Grid component available through Panda CSS layout primitives

stack.comment: Stack component for flex-based layout (HStack, VStack)

container.comment: Container component for centered max-width layouts

aspect-ratio.comment: Aspect Ratio component for maintaining ratios

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component for expandable content; Accordion also available

splitter.comment: Splitter component for resizable split panes

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

code-editors.comment: Code component for syntax highlighting but no full editor integration

form-libraries.comment: No official form library integration; components work with any form solution

animation-libraries.comment: Presence component from Ark UI handles enter/exit animations; CSS-based transitions

icon-libraries.comment: Examples use Lucide icons; compatible with any icon library

date-libraries.comment: Date Picker uses @internationalized/date via Ark UI for date handling

aria-compliant.comment: Built on Ark UI which is WCAG compliant with proper ARIA patterns

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support inherited from Ark UI's Zag.js-powered state machines

screen-reader-tested.comment: Ark UI components tested with real assistive technologies

focus-management.comment: Proper focus trapping in dialogs, focus restoration, and focus indicators from Ark UI

wcag-level.comment: Claims WCAG compliance but specific level not documented

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent accessibility from Ark UI foundation: state-machine driven, screen reader tested, WCAG compliant

bundle-size-full.comment: Copy-paste model like shadcn/ui; no full bundle. Components copied into project, only pay for what you use

bundle-size-core.comment: Individual component sizes vary; depends on which components are copied and Ark UI primitives used

tree-shakeable.comment: Inherently tree-shakeable as code is copied directly into project

zero-runtime.comment: Panda CSS is zero-runtime (compile-time CSS); Tailwind option also zero-runtime. Ark UI has JS runtime for behavior

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy loaded using framework-specific dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with component examples, installation guides, and theming; could be more comprehensive on edge cases

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation site has interactive component previews with variant toggles

figma-kit.comment: Official Figma kit with design tokens, primitives, and light/dark mode support

cli-generator.comment: CLI tool (npx @park-ui/cli) for adding components: single, multiple, or all at once

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~7,800 weekly downloads for @park-ui/panda-preset as of December 2024

commercial-support.comment: No commercial support or enterprise tier; MIT licensed open-source project

style-override.comment: Components accept className, use CSS variables through Panda/Tailwind, and support Ark UI slots

compound-components.comment: Extensive compound component pattern inherited from Ark UI (e.g., Dialog.Root/Trigger/Content)

render-props.comment: Ark UI supports render props for state-based customization (asChild pattern)

slots.comment: Named slots for content injection inherited from Ark UI

unstyled-mode.comment: Can use underlying Ark UI primitives directly for unstyled components
